d: A member of the Paris Commune. Staunch advocate of Women's rights, wrote also on the history of religion, morals, literature, language, and comedy. Married to Marx's second daughter, Laura.
s: paul lafargue first international a member of the paris commune. staunch advocate of women's rights, wrote also on the history of religion, morals, literature, language, and comedy. married to marx's second daughter, laura. letters criticism
